images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female racer with a flawless, realistic skin texture and large expressive eyes, standing on a luxurious yacht deck. She is dressed in a trendy, form-fitting sports bra and high-waisted yoga pants that accentuate her slim waist and curvy figure, the fabric texture sleek and smooth against her skin. The background is a blurred, aesthetic seascape with soft fairy lights bokeh creating a dreamy, vintage nostalgic atmosphere. She stands at eye-level, her finger lightly touching her lips in a gesture of playful seduction, looking directly at the camera with a cute yet alluring gaze. The image features a bleach bypass color grade with high contrast and low saturation, shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
